I tried this and it didn't work for me.
Love this! Just bought one for my sister too.

feature1.name: feature_intro
feature1.label: Overview
feature1.title: What This TikTok Comment Generator Is Good At
feature1.description:
This tool is built for creators and community managers who want fast, copy-ready replies without opening a blank doc. Paste a comment or video, pick a tone, and the TikTok Comment Generator streams 3-5 distinct reply options in seconds.

The focus is reducing friction. Instead of writing the same five replies by hand or copying a generic 'Thanks!', the generator gives you angles that match the comment or video, your brand voice, and the language your audience actually speaks.

items.title: Reply options, not just one line
items.description: The TikTok Comment Generator outputs 3-5 distinct replies per comment or video so you can pick the one that fits the moment instead of settling for a single output.

items.title: Built for creators and brand pages
items.description: Tone, length, and language controls help you stay on brand whether you reply as a creator, a business, or a community manager.

items.title: Human-sounding output
items.description: Prompts are tuned to keep replies sounding human and avoid spammy, robotic, or oversell language, with no emoji overkill and no forced hashtags.

feature2.name: feature_benefits
feature2.label: Benefits
feature2.title: Why Creators Reach for the TikTok Comment Generator
feature2.description: Replying fast on TikTok is half the job. This generator keeps replies flowing without wearing out your drafting brain.

items.title: Reply in seconds, not minutes
items.description: Stream replies while you scroll so engagement never has to wait until you sit down at a laptop.

items.title: Stay consistent across accounts
items.description: Use the same tone and length presets across multiple accounts so your voice stays recognizable on every post.

items.title: Local history for quick retries
items.description: Recent prompts and replies stay on your device, so you can re-run a winning tone without retyping the comment.

feature3.name: use_cases
feature3.label: Use Cases
feature3.title: Best Uses for the TikTok Comment Generator
feature3.description: Lightweight enough for personal accounts, structured enough for community management workflows.

items.title: Solo creators
items.description: The TikTok Comment Generator helps you reply to fans, questions, and haters faster without copy-pasting the same three lines.

items.title: Brand and agency pages
items.description: Match brand voice with tone presets and keep replies brand-safe and consistent across posts.

items.title: Community managers
items.description: Handle thank-yous, questions, clarifications, and negatives from one focused tool.

how_to_use.name: how_to_use
how_to_use.label: HOW TO USE
how_to_use.title: How to Use the TikTok Comment Generator in 3 Steps
how_to_use.description: From pasted comment to copy-ready reply with the TikTok Comment Generator in under a minute.

items.title: Paste the comment or video
items.description: Copy the TikTok comment or video you want to reply to and add optional context like the video topic or post type.

items.title: Pick tone, length, and language
items.description: Choose a reply goal, tone, length, and output language. The model preset controls speed vs. creativity.

items.title: Generate, copy, or expand
items.description: Stream the replies from the TikTok Comment Generator, copy the one you want, copy all of them, or send the best one into AI Write for longer content.

faq.name: faq
faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: TikTok Comment Generator FAQ
faq.description: Short answers about the TikTok Comment Generator's scope, privacy, and usage.

items.title: Is this TikTok Comment Generator free?
items.description: Yes. You can generate, copy, copy all, and continue in AI Write without signing up.

items.title: How many replies does the TikTok Comment Generator write per comment or video?
items.description: Each run streams 3-5 distinct replies so you can pick the one that fits the moment or mix them for inspiration.

items.title: Can the TikTok Comment Generator keep replies brand-safe?
items.description: Yes. Pick the professional tone to stay brand-safe, or use warm and empathetic tones for community-friendly replies.

items.title: What languages can the TikTok Comment Generator write in?
items.description: English, Chinese, Japanese, Korean, German, Russian, and more. Pick an output language in the form before you generate.

items.title: Does it store my input history?
items.description: Only locally in your browser. Nothing is uploaded to a server. You can clear the history at any time from the history panel.

items.title: Can I expand a reply into longer content?
items.description: Yes. Use Continue in AI Write to send the reply into the writing workspace and turn it into a longer caption, post, or script.

items.title: How do I reply to TikTok comments fast as a creator?
items.description: Paste the comment or video into the TikTok Comment Generator, pick a reply goal like thank-you or answer-question, choose a tone, and copy one of the 3-5 streamed replies. It turns a 5-minute reply session into a few seconds per comment.

items.title: What are good TikTok comment reply examples for brands?
items.description: Strong brand replies stay on-goal: thank fans warmly, answer product questions concisely, clarify misunderstandings with empathy, and handle negative comments without defensiveness. The TikTok Comment Generator drafts one example per goal so you can match the moment without copying generic templates.

cta.name: cta
cta.title: Run the TikTok Comment Generator on Your Next Post
cta.description: Open the TikTok Comment Generator now, copy the reply you want, or send the best one to AI Write when you need a longer caption.
